data.en: Where's the dining hall?
data.cn: 餐厅在哪里？

data.en: It's in front of the art building.
data.cn: 它在艺术楼前面。

data.en: The classroom building is behind the sports field.
data.cn: 教学楼在运动场后面。

data.en: The teachers' building is across from the school hall.
data.cn: 办公楼在学校礼堂对面。

data.en: It's between the library and the gym.
data.cn: 它在图书馆和体育馆之间。

data.en: Is there a student centre in this school?
data.cn: 这所学校有学生中心吗？
data.hint: there be 句型的一般疑问句

data.en: Yes, there is.
data.cn: 是的，有。

data.en: Where's Ms Gao's office?
data.cn: 高老师的办公室在哪里？

data.en: Her office is in the teachers' building.
data.cn: 她的办公室在办公楼里。

data.en: The science building is next to the music hall.
data.cn: 科学楼在音乐厅旁边。

data.en: What's your new classroom like, Peter?
data.cn: 彼得，你的新教室是什么样的？

data.en: It's large and there are 40 student desks.
data.cn: 它很大，有40张学生课桌。
data.hint: there are 后接复数名词

data.en: There is a teacher's desk in front of the blackboard.
data.cn: 黑板前面有一张老师课桌。
data.hint: there is 后接单数名词

data.en: Where do you sit?
data.cn: 你坐哪里？
data.hint: 助动词 do 用于疑问句

data.en: I sit in the middle of the classroom.
data.cn: 我坐在教室中间。
data.hint: in the middle of 在...中间

data.en: What's special in your classroom?
data.cn: 你们教室里有什么特别的东西？

data.en: There's a smart whiteboard next to the blackboard.
data.cn: 黑板旁边有一块智能白板。

data.en: There's another blackboard at the back of the classroom.
data.cn: 教室后面还有另一块黑板。
data.hint: at the back of 在...后面

data.en: We put up important notices there.
data.cn: 我们在那里张贴重要通知。

data.en: We put our things in the desk drawers.
data.cn: 我们把东西放在课桌抽屉里。

data.en: Where are the bookcases?
data.cn: 书架在哪里？

data.en: They are next to the window.
data.cn: 它们在窗户旁边。
data.hint: 代词 They 指代复数

data.en: Is there a whiteboard in your classroom?
data.cn: 你教室里有白板吗？

data.en: Are there any lockers in the classroom?
data.cn: 教室里有寄物柜吗？

data.en: No, there aren't.
data.cn: 不，没有。

data.en: There are some trees in front of the sports field.
data.cn: 运动场前面有一些树。

data.en: There's a screen on the wall.
data.cn: 墙上有一个屏幕。

data.en: The teacher's desk is in the corner.
data.cn: 老师的课桌在角落里。
data.hint: in the corner 在角落里

data.en: Students sit on chairs at long tables.
data.cn: 学生们坐在长桌旁的椅子上。

data.en: There are many modern buildings in my school.
data.cn: 我的学校里有很多现代化的建筑。
data.hint: many 修饰可数名词复数

data.en: My new school is great and very beautiful.
data.cn: 我的新学校很棒，非常漂亮。
accept: My new school is very beautiful and great.

data.en: There's a large sports field next to the teachers' building.
data.cn: 办公楼旁边有一个大运动场。

data.en: All the students go there and do exercises.
data.cn: 所有的学生都去那里做操。

data.en: Every Monday we raise the flag there.
data.cn: 每个星期一我们都在那里升旗。
accept: We raise the flag there every Monday.

data.en: It's a special way to start the week.
data.cn: 这是开始新的一周的一种特别方式。
data.hint: start the week 开始这一周

data.en: We spend most of the time in our classroom.
data.cn: 我们大部分时间都在教室里度过。
data.hint: spend time in... 在...度过时间
accept: In our classroom, we spend most of the time.
Most of the time we spend in our classroom.

data.en: This week I sit next to my best friend.
data.cn: 这周我坐在我最好的朋友旁边。
accept: I sit next to my best friend this week.

data.en: The dining hall is my favourite place.
data.cn: 食堂是我最喜欢的地方。
accept: My favourite place is the dining hall.

data.en: They make delicious jiaozi.
data.cn: 他们做美味的饺子。

data.en: Your school sounds fun!
data.cn: 你的学校听起来很有趣！

data.en: I study on a floating school.
data.cn: 我在一所水上学校学习。

data.en: The boat picks me up early in the morning.
data.cn: 小船清晨来接我。
accept: Early in the morning the boat picks me up.

data.en: Each boat has one teacher and one class.
data.cn: 每艘船有一名老师和一个班级。
accept: One teacher and one class are on each boat.

data.en: The teacher teaches us all the subjects.
data.cn: 老师教我们所有的科目。
accept: All the subjects the teacher teaches us.

data.en: The boat is long and wide.
data.cn: 船又长又宽。
accept: The boat is wide and long.

data.en: Big windows bring in lots of sunlight.
data.cn: 大窗户带来了充足的阳光。

data.en: Fresh air comes in through the windows.
data.cn: 新鲜空气通过窗户进来。

data.en: It gets its power from the sun.
data.cn: 它的电力来自太阳。

data.en: The boat takes me home at the end of the day.
data.cn: 放学时船送我回家。
data.hint: take sb. home 送某人回家
accept: At the end of the day, the boat takes me home.

data.en: I love my floating school!
data.cn: 我爱我的水上学校！
